chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 25 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.100/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Sara Malkani, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that the petition may be disposed of upon terms that the respondent department shall pass final assessment order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. The petitioner shall remain at liberty to seek recourse against the said order, if aggrieved. Petition as aforesaid stands disposed of. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
